title: pdfread: fix bad name detection and error message
description: Ensure name lexing detects malformed #xx escapes (including truncated hex) and raises a clearer error. Add regression tests. Source: camlpdf Changes.txt 2.9.

title: pdfread: allow encryption info without password
description: When encrypted PDFs with object streams fail to decrypt due to missing/wrong password, still return a PDF structure so encryption metadata can be queried (what_encryption/permissions). Add regression test using encrypted objstm read with no password.

title: Performance pass on read/write pipeline
description: Review hot paths in pdfread/pdfwrite/object streams; propose or implement small optimizations with tests/bench notes.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Optimized lex_hexstring to decode on the fly (no temporary digit array) and added wbtests for odd nibble padding + whitespace handling.

title: pdfpage: export pagenumber_of_target and add ppstub
description: Add missing public helpers to match camlpdf pdfpage.mli.

title: Add end-to-end PDF tests
description: Add e2e tests for read/write/roundtrip using real PDFs (including pandoc-generated), covering bookmarks/text/streams.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added e2e tests for camlpdf intro/logo PDFs (parse + roundtrip + stream presence). Pandoc is installed but no PDF engine (pdflatex/xelatex/tectonic/etc.) available here, so I could not generate a pandoc PDF; can add one once an engine or sample file is provided.

title: Add unicode PDF fixtures and extraction tests
description: Download a unicode PDF fixture, generate a small unicode PDF in-memory, and add extraction tests/instructions.
close_reason: Added unicode fixtures and CJK extraction test.

title: Clean up core import/deprecation warnings
description: Add missing core imports in moon.pkg.json files and fix deprecated API usage (starts_with/trim_space/etc.) to reduce warnings.

title: pdfread: skip malformed object stream decrypts
description: When parsing object streams during read, failures (malformed/decryption issues) should log a warning and continue rather than aborting the read. Add regression test by corrupting /N in an object stream.

title: Add PDF text extraction utility + tests
description: Add a small utility to extract text from PDFs and tests using existing sample PDFs to validate output.
close_reason: Implemented PDF text extraction utility, CLI, and tests.

title: Increase black-box test coverage
description: No API parity gaps found in camlpdf vs MoonBit audit (naming differences only). Add black-box tests across modules to push coverage toward ~95% and prevent regressions during refactor.
close_reason: Added pdfutil/pdf black-box tests; coverage reduced to 3 unreachable lines

title: recrypt_pdf fails with correct password (AES256)
description: Observed recrypt_pdf(@pdfcrypt.encrypt_pdf_AES256(...), "user") raising PdfError.Msg even with correct password. Expected: return encrypted PDF when password is valid.
acceptance_criteria: recrypt_pdf succeeds for AES256-encrypted PDFs with correct user or owner password; wrong password still errors

title: Fix CJK /ToUnicode parsing
description: Improve /ToUnicode CMap parsing so CJK PDFs decode correctly without parse errors; add a CJK fixture test.

title: pdfpage: add cycle detection in find_pages_quick
description: Add real cycle detection (not just depth guard) in pdfpage.find_pages_quick, using page tree object numbers to detect cycles in malformed PDFs. Add test for cyclic /Pages /Kids referencing itself. Source: camlpdf Changes.txt 2.9.

title: pdf: support array indexing in lookup_chain/replace_chain
description: Match camlpdf behavior: allow chain elements like '/[0]' to traverse arrays in lookup_chain and replace_chain.

title: pdfread: probe page tree after read when no objstm
description: Mirror camlpdf read_pdf behavior: call endpage hook to trigger malformed fallback when no object streams.

title: pdftree: keep last entry when repairing duplicate keys
description: Align name/number tree duplicate-key repair with camlpdf: after sorting, drop earlier duplicates so the last entry wins. Add regression test for duplicate keys. Source: camlpdf pdftree.ml and Changes.txt 2.9/2.8.1.

title: Raise pdf library coverage to 90%
description: Target 90% line coverage for the core pdf library packages (exclude cmd/ and .mooncakes). Add black-box tests to close gaps; keep IO isolated. Track coverage baseline and progress using moon coverage report summary.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added black-box tests across pdfannot/pdfimage/pdfdest/pdfpagelabels/pdftransform/pdfpage/pdffun/pdfcodec; coverage now 50.70% (7529/14851) for library files. moon test passes.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added more black-box tests for pdfcodec (extra encodings), pdfops (complex spaces and text ops), pdfimage (gray/cmyk), pdfdest (Fit/FitR). Coverage now 51.25% (7611/14851). moon test passes.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added pdfcrypt tests (banlist + 40-bit encrypt/decrypt) and pdfpage fixup tests. Coverage now 51.67% (7673/14851). moon test passes.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Fix change_pages test: accept direct OpenAction and Dest objects; uses lookup_direct to avoid indirect-only expectation.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added black-box tests for sha2 vectors, AES256 encrypt/decrypt, xobject processing, and pdftext type stringification via read_* helpers; pdfpage xobject coverage up. Latest coverage summary total 9970/17968 (~55.5%).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added tests for merge_pdfs retain_numbering path, remove_duplicate_fonts (duplicate streams), and expanded pdfops tests (string_of_op/concat_bytess/parse_stream/parse_operators). Coverage now 10058/17968 (~56%).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added pagelabels tests: labelstyle/string, prefix letters, add_label replica, merge_pagelabels; pdfpagelabels coverage now 186/233. Total coverage 10116/17968 (~56.3%).

comments.text: Added pdfspace write/read tests for CalRGB, Lab, PatternWithBaseColourspace, Separation, DeviceN plus tint helper; pdfspace coverage 204/304. Total coverage 10200/17968 (~56.8%).

comments.text: Added pdfread blackbox lexing tests for lex_name, lex_number, lex_string, and lex_hexstring. Ran moon fmt and moon test pdfread/pdfread_lex_test.mbt -v.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Expanded pdfread parse_single_object coverage for names, strings, booleans, and null. Ran moon fmt and moon test pdfread/pdfread_test.mbt -v.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added pdfread header tests for version parsing, malformed major, missing minor digits error, and linearized detection. Ran moon fmt and moon test pdfread/pdfread_header_test.mbt -v.

comments.text: Added pdfio bitstream blackbox tests covering putval/getval, bitstream_pos/seek, and align. Ran moon fmt and moon test pdfio/pdfio_bitstream_test.mbt -v.

comments.text: Expanded pdfio tests for read_lines, setinit/bytes_of_input errors, string_of_input, and getinit output; ran moon fmt and moon test pdfio/pdfio_test.mbt -v.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added pdfio extra tests for fillbytes/bytes_selfmap, bytes_of_charlist/arraylist, copybytes, setinit/getinit edge cases, bitstream error paths, and write_bitstream_append_aligned. Ran moon fmt and moon test pdfio/pdfio_extra_test.mbt -v.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added async pdfio channel test covering input_of_channel, bytes_of_input_channel, bytes_to_output_channel, output_of_channel, and flush. Updated pdfio moon.pkg.json test-import for async.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added pdfio debug tests for input_output_of_bytes seek/flush, empty append, getval_31, and debug_next_n_chars rewind. Ran moon fmt and moon test pdfio/pdfio_debug_test.mbt -v.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added pdfwrite extra tests for string_of_pdf_including_data, hex/pdf string escapes, scientific notation expansion, short names, debug_whole_pdf, and async pdf_to_file/pdf_to_file_options paths (recrypt expected error). Updated pdfwrite test-imports for async/pdfpage.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Extended pdfwrite_extra_test with negative exponent formatting, delimiter/control name encoding, and objstm generation with indirect /Length; adjusted range syntax. Ran moon fmt and moon test pdfwrite/pdfwrite_extra_test.mbt -v.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added malformed PDF tests to cover fallback behavior, error_on_malformed, revision=-1, and lex failure paths. Extended pdfwrite name escaping and scientific real formatting checks. Re-ran targeted tests and updated coverage logs.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added CCITT blackbox tests (Group3/Group4 roundtrip + varied runs) and extra decode_from_input coverage (filter arrays, ASCIIHex/ASCII85 error cases). pdfcodec coverage now 1134/2143 (ccitt_decode 157/480, pdfcodec.mbt 718/1307).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added more pdfcodec blackbox tests (CCITT pass/vertical modes, k>0/malformed rejects, ASCIIHex edge cases, decode_from_input filter array/non-name/Crypt, JBIG2 error paths). pdfcodec coverage now 1750/2143 (~81.7%). Project-only coverage currently ~68.8% (10093/14666), so still needs broad test expansion.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added extensive calculator/parse/error tests in pdffun (coverage now 656/926, ~71%). Tests cover arithmetic, trig/log, stack ops, bool/comparison ops, if/ifelse parsing, and error paths.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Project-only coverage now ~70.75% (10376/14666) after pdffun tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Expanded pdfops blackbox tests with diverse operator roundtrip + inline image string rendering + OpUnknown path. pdfops coverage now 800/1064 (~75%). Project-only coverage ~73.16% (10730/14666).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added pdfcrypt tests for 128-bit and AESV2 encryption, unencrypted decrypt path, and get_encryption_values. Note: recrypt_pdf still fails even with correct AES256 password; filed bug mbtpdf-bua. pdfcrypt package coverage now 635/867 (~73%).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added pdfimage tests for indexed RGB/CMYK, 4bpp gray, and bad /Decode handling. pdfimage coverage now 213/424 (~50%). Project-only coverage ~73.52% (10782/14666).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added merge_pdfs test for process_struct_trees=true and names length mismatch. pdfmerge coverage now 289/615 (~47%). Project-only coverage ~73.68% (10806/14666).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added pdftext write tests; pdftext/write.mbt coverage now 70/117. Project-only coverage now 23421/32634 (71.77%) after running coverage report.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added extract text black-box tests (text ops, invalid unicode, xobject traversal). pdftext/extract.mbt coverage now 115/122. Project-only coverage now 23455/32634 (71.87%).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added remove_duplicate_fonts coverage for distinct streams; pdfmerge/pdfmerge.mbt coverage now 296/615. Project-only coverage now 23461/32634 (71.89%).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Expanded pdfdest tests for arrays, name/string resolution, pdfobject_of_destination, transform_destination. pdfdest/pdfdest.mbt coverage now 188/203. Project-only coverage now 23661/32634 (72.50%).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Expanded pdfimage black-box tests (decode defaults for Lab/ICCBased/DeviceN/Pattern, 8bpp decode, indexed Lab, missing table). pdfimage/pdfimage.mbt coverage now 290/424. Project-only coverage now 23839/32634 (73.05%).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added pdfst black-box tests for trim/merge/renumber paths and fixed renumber_parent_trees to update StructTreeRoot without replace_chain (handles indirect /Root). pdfst coverage now 288/310; project-only coverage (no .mooncakes/cmd) 24157/32511 = 74.30%. moon test pdfst/pdfst_test.mbt -v OK.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added pdfstandard14 tests covering implicit/custom encoding fallbacks and kerning path in textwidth. project-only coverage (no .mooncakes/cmd) now 24173/32511 = 74.35%. moon test pdfstandard14/pdfstandard14_test.mbt -v OK.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Expanded pdfmerge black-box tests for destination renaming, /Dests merge, /OCProperties, and /AcroForm. pdfmerge coverage now 475/615; project-only coverage (no .mooncakes/cmd) 24525/32511 = 75.44%. moon test pdfmerge/pdfmerge_test.mbt -v OK.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added pdfmarks tests for outline linkage/counts and action preservation. pdfmarks coverage now 252/268; project-only coverage (no .mooncakes/cmd) 24717/32511 = 76.03%. moon test pdfmarks/pdfmarks_test.mbt -v OK.

title: Port camlpdf to MoonBit
description: Track the phased port for camlpdf feature parity in MoonBit.

title: Phase 0: API map + package layout
description: Inventory camlpdf modules; map public API; decide MoonBit package structure; draft compatibility notes.
notes: Created docs/port-plan.md with package layout, naming notes, and dependencies.

title: mbtpdf-mhm.10: Phase 9: pdfdecomp example
description: Port camlpdf/examples/pdfdecomp.ml as a MoonBit CLI (decompress all streams).

title: mbtpdf-mhm.11: Phase 10: pdfdraft example
description: Port camlpdf/examples/pdfdraft.ml as a MoonBit CLI (replace images with crossed boxes).

title: mbtpdf-mhm.12: Phase 11: pdfencrypt example
description: Port camlpdf/examples/pdfencrypt.ml as a MoonBit CLI (encrypt with AES128, NoEdit/NoPrint).

title: mbtpdf-mhm.13: Phase 12: pdfhello example
description: Port camlpdf/examples/pdfhello.ml as a MoonBit CLI (write hello.pdf).

title: Phase 15: implement remove_unreferenced
description: Port Pdf.remove_unreferenced and objects_referenced helpers from camlpdf; update examples to use cleanup.

title: Phase 16: pdf iteration helpers
description: Port objiter_inorder, objiter_gen, iter_stream, objselect, and unique_key from camlpdf pdf.mli

title: Phase 17: pdf whitespace and toget helpers
description: Add is_whitespace/is_not_whitespace/is_delimiter plus toget + accessors in pdf package.

title: Phase 18: pdf matrix helpers
description: Add parse_matrix, make_matrix, transform_rect, transform_quadpoints to pdf package.

title: Phase 1: Core model + util/io
description: Implement pdf core types, pdfutil, pdfio, pdfdate, pdfunits, base errors.
notes: Phase 1 complete: pdfutil/pdfio/pdf core scaffolding + helpers.

title: Phase 1a: compat package decision + stub
description: Decide on and implement a compat/re-export package for camlpdf-style names if useful.
notes: No compat package needed; focus on functionality parity only.

title: Phase 1b: implement pdfio core helpers
description: Fill out pdfio: bytes helpers, input/output constructors, read_line/lines, setinit/getinit. Keep placeholders for channel IO.
notes: Implemented core pdfio helpers and byte utilities; added placeholders for channel IO; renamed mutable byte buffer to MutableBytes.

title: Phase 1c: core pdf helpers
description: Implement Pdf empty doc, object map helpers, add/remove/lookups, and basic utilities.
notes: Implemented core pdf helpers: empty doc, objmap utilities, dict ops, lookup/direct, getstream, parse_rectangle, add/remove.

title: Phase 19: pdf misc helpers
description: Add find_indirect, objects_of_list, changes, and bigarray_of_stream to pdf package.

title: Phase 20: pdf generate_id and string_of_pdf
description: Expose generate_id and string_of_pdf ref in pdf module; wire pdfwrite init.

title: Phase 21: pdf deep_copy
description: Port deep_copy from camlpdf to clone Pdf objects/streams safely.

title: Phase 22: pdfutil strings + list helpers
description: Port camlpdf/pdfutil.mli sections Debug Printing, Strings, Lists (through split_around). Implement using Array where appropriate.

title: Phase 23: pdfutil int32/int64 helpers
description: Port camlpdf/pdfutil.mli integer helpers (i32/i64 conversions, arithmetic, shifts, min/max).

title: Phase 24: pdfutil assoc lists + refs
description: Port pdfutil association-list helpers (lookup/add/replace/remove/merge) and reference helpers (set/clear/flip, ref arithmetic, list ref cons/prepend).

title: Phase 25: pdfutil geometry helpers
description: Port pdfutil geometry helpers (vector type, mkvector, invert, offset_point, perpendicular, sqr, veclength, scalevectolength, mkunitvector, between, distance_between).

title: Phase 26: pdfutil numbers helpers
description: Port pdfutil numbers helpers (round/iround, pow2 utilities, pow, compare_i, min/max, fabs, even/odd, pi/root2, rad/deg, sign_extend, isdigit, toint, safe_float).

title: Phase 27: pdfutil option helpers
description: Port pdfutil option helpers (some, none, unopt).

title: Phase 28: pdfutil array helpers
description: Implement array-specific helpers from camlpdf pdfutil: set_array, array_iter2, array_map2, swap.

title: Phase 2: Codecs + flate
description: Implement pdfcodec + pdfflate (pure) and stream helpers for round-trips.
notes: Implemented decode_pdfstream_onestage for FlateDecode (/Fl) with DecodeParms predictor handling (TIFF/PNG 8bpc); updates /Filter, /DecodeParms, /Length. Exposed PdfObject/Stream constructors via pub(all) for cross-package updates.

title: Phase 29: pdfutil functional helpers
description: Port misc functional helpers from camlpdf pdfutil: notpred, eq/neq, rev_compare, xor, ident, always/never, applyn, tuple, mkunit, do_return, do_many.

title: Phase 30: pdfutil box helpers
description: Implement box/rectangle helpers from camlpdf pdfutil: box_union, box_union_float, box_overlap, box_overlap_float.

title: Phase 31: pdfutil roman numeral helpers
description: Implement roman numeral helpers from camlpdf pdfutil: roman, roman_upper, roman_lower.

title: Phase 32: pdfutil file helpers
description: Implement file helpers from camlpdf pdfutil: contents_of_file, contents_to_file, leafnames_of_dir.

title: Phase 33: pdfutil pair helpers
description: Add remaining pair helpers from camlpdf pdfutil: conspair, conspairopt, pairs_of_list.

title: Phase 34: pdfutil hashset helpers
description: Implement hashset_of_list from camlpdf pdfutil using Map[K, Unit].

title: Phase 35: pdfutil clock helpers
description: Port pdfutil clock/time helpers: clock(), time ref, tt' stub.

title: Phase 36: pdfutil tree type
description: Add Tree[A] type from camlpdf pdfutil (Lf | Br of value * left * right).

title: Phase 37: pdfread encryption helpers
description: Implement pdfread.what_encryption and pdfread.permissions using pdfcrypt/pdfcryptprimitives and pdfwrite.EncryptionMethod.

title: Phase 38: pdfcodec encode_predictor
description: Implement pdfcodec.encode_predictor for predictors 11 and 12, matching camlpdf behavior.

title: Phase 3: Parse/write pipeline
description: Implement pdfgenlex, pdfread, pdfe, pdfwrite; validate read->write->read.
notes: Add pdfflate compression roundtrip tests for zlib header and raw deflate.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented name escaping for PDF names in pdfwrite; added test coverage.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Write PDF header with binary comment bytes in pdfwrite; add header test.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Format PDF real numbers without scientific notation and trim trailing zeros in pdfwrite.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Add tests for real formatting (no exponent, trimmed zeros) in pdfwrite.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Warn on invalid PDF names and return '/' like camlpdf; add test.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Use pdfe logger in pdfwrite debug_whole_pdf for consistent logging.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Warn when string_of_pdf_including_data encounters a ToGet stream, matching camlpdf behavior.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Normalize -0.0 formatting in pdfwrite; add test.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Add xref stream output when preserve_objstm/generate_objstm is set; add roundtrip test.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Align pdfgenlex debug token strings with camlpdf output.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Match pdfgenlex string_of_tokens leading newline formatting.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Align pdfread string_of_lexeme output with camlpdf and add local PDF string/real formatting helpers.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Switch pdfread print_lexeme to use string_of_lexeme (matches camlpdf output formatting).

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Clarify pdfflate compress docstring as stored-blocks-only implementation.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implement pdfutil flprint/fleprint with cached /dev/stdout/stderr handles and update pdfread print_lexeme to emit lexeme plus trailing space via flprint.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Unescape quoted strings in pdfgenlex lexer so " becomes literal quote, matching camlpdf get_string behavior.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Add pdfgenlex test covering escaped quote handling in quoted strings.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Handle endobj suffix in lex_keyword (rewind extra chars) and add wbtest covering the rewind behavior.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Return LexNone for unknown chars in lex_next (match camlpdf) and add wbtest for uppercase unknown token handling.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Wrap lex_next in error recovery (log + StopLexing) to match camlpdf and add wbtest for recovery on unterminated string.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Make lex_hexstring raise on invalid hex digits (matching camlpdf) and add wbtest for invalid hex input.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Align lex_dictionary with camlpdf minus_one behavior (opening << already consumed) and add wbtest for closing dict token.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Make lex_name raise on invalid hex and add wbtest for invalid hex name.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implement object stream generation/preservation in pdfwrite with xref stream type-2 entries; add roundtrip test for generated object streams.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Add roundtrip test to verify preserve_objstm keeps /ObjStm output.

title: Phase 39: pdfio bitstream helpers
description: Port bitstream read/write helpers from camlpdf/pdfio.ml (bitbytes_of_input, getbit*, align, write bitstream utilities) and wire up Bitstream/BitstreamWrite in pdfio.

title: Phase 40: pdfcodec encode_ccitt (Group 3)
description: Port CCITT Group 3 encoder from camlpdf/pdfcodec.ml, including run-length tables and scanline encoding using pdfio bitstream helpers.

title: Phase 41: pdfcodec encode_ccittg4
description: Implement CCITT Group 4 encoding (camlpdf uses external imagemagick via pdf_of_file hook). Port equivalent behavior in MoonBit, including temp files, process invocation, and stream extraction.

title: Phase 43: pdfcodec decode CCITTFax
description: Port decode_CCITTFax (G3/G4) from camlpdf/pdfcodec.ml and wire into decode_pdfstream for /CCITTFaxDecode.

title: Phase 44: pdfcodec ASCIIHex encode/decode
description: Port encode/decode ASCIIHex from camlpdf/pdfcodec.ml and integrate into decode/encode paths.

title: Phase 45: pdfcodec ASCII85 encode/decode
description: Port encode/decode ASCII85 from camlpdf/pdfcodec.ml and integrate into encode/decode paths.

title: Phase 46: pdfcodec RunLength encode/decode
description: Port RunLength encode/decode from camlpdf/pdfcodec.ml and integrate into encode/decode paths.

title: Phase 47: pdfcodec LZW encode/decode
description: Implement LZW encode/decode in pdfcodec and wire into filter handling; add wbtests.

title: Phase 48: pdfcodec JBIG2 decode hook
description: Implement JBIG2Decode via external jbig2dec hook and PBM post-processing; wire into stream decode; add wbtests for PBM parsing.

title: Phase 4: Page tree + operators
description: Implement pdftree, pdfpage, pdfops, pdfspace, pdftransform, pdfpaper, pdfpagelabels, pdfdest.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Add pdfunits module with unit conversions and basic tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Add pdfpaper module with standard sizes/tests and make pdfunits.Unit public for cross-package construction.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Add pdftransform module (ops, matrices, compose/invert/decompose) with tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Add pdftree module for name/number tree build/read

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Add pdfdest module plus name tree helpers in pdf

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Add pdfpagelabels module with label parsing, formatting, and merge helpers

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Add pdffun module for PDF function parsing/evaluation

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Add pdfspace module with colour space parsing and basic tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Add pdfops package with operator parsing/writing and basic tests.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented core pdfpage port (types/page tree read/build, renumber/prefix ops, xobject helpers, minimum_valid_pdf) and added missing pdf helpers (catalog_of_pdf, objiter/objselfmap, page_reference_numbers, renumber_object_parsed). moon info && moon fmt run; moon check pdfpage passes with existing repo warnings.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added pdfpage fixup helpers (duplicate pages/annots/dests, parent rewrite, inherit replacement, page target helpers); updated pdfpage pkg.generated.mbti.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Added pdfmarks and pdfst packages (bookmark/outline handling and structure-tree trimming). Added pdfpage change_pages/pdf_of_pages support (page subset rebuild, bookmark filtering, reference renumbering) and wired pdfst endpage + imports. Ran moon info && moon fmt.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Phase 4 complete: pdftree/pdfdest/pdfpagelabels/pdfpaper/pdftransform/pdfspace/pdfops/pdfpage implemented; added pdfmarks/pdfst and pdfpage change_pages/pdf_of_pages; moon info && moon fmt run.

title: Phase 49: pdfcodec /Crypt filter passthrough
description: Handle /Crypt filter by returning input bytes without decoding in pdfcodec stream decoders.

title: Phase 51: pdfimage audit + basic tests
description: Audit pdfimage against camlpdf and add basic tests for colspace/bpc.

title: pdfread: add e2e parse test for intro PDF
description: Add a blackbox test that parses camlpdf/introduction_to_camlpdf.pdf and verifies basic properties (page count, object count).

title: pdfwrite tests: update call signatures
description: Fix pdfwrite/pdfread test call sites to match current pdf_to_output/pdf_of_input signatures and adjust invalid float literal.

title: test: run moon test and address failures
description: Run moon test (or focused subset) and fix any compile/runtime test failures that appear.

title: pdftext: support predefined encodings in write_encoding
description: Implement write_encoding for Standard/MacRoman/WinAnsi/MacExpert plus base encoding handling for CustomEncoding and FillUndefinedWithStandard.

title: pdfwrite: implement encryption support
description: Port camlpdf/pdfwrite encryption path: wire Encryption settings into pdf_to_output, support recrypt/build_new_id, and call pdfcrypt encryptors; add focused tests.

title: pdfcodec: encode predictor support
description: Implement predictor encoding support in pdfcodec.encode_pdfstream (PNGUp) with /DecodeParms, matching camlpdf process_prediction; add tests.

title: pdfcodec: CCITT encode in encode_pdfstream
description: Wire encode_pdfstream to use CCITT/CCITTG4 encoders and add stream roundtrip tests with DecodeParms.

title: Phase 5: Fonts + text
description: Implement pdfafm, pdfafmdata, pdfglyphlist, pdfcmap, pdfstandard14, pdftext, pdffun.

title: pdfread: decrypt object streams
description: Decrypt /ObjStm streams using pdfcrypt with correct obj/gen when reading encrypted PDFs.

title: pdfread: test lazy encrypted objstm parsing
description: Add a regression test that reads an encrypted PDF with object streams using pdf_of_input_lazy and forces parsing an object from an object stream.

title: pdfread: decode objstm/xref streams strictly
description: Match camlpdf by decoding object streams and xref streams via pdfcodec.decode_pdfstream (no best-effort partial decode).

title: pdfread: parse only requested objstm entries
description: Match camlpdf lazy parsing by honoring requested object indexes when parsing object streams.

title: pdfread: remove xref/objstm objects after eager parse
description: Match camlpdf by deleting xref stream and object stream objects after eager parse; add a regression test.

title: pdfread: malformed PDF recovery
description: Port camlpdf malformed PDF fallback parser (read_malformed_pdf and helpers), wire into read_pdf_internal fallback path when strict parsing fails (except encryption errors).
acceptance_criteria: Fallback path implemented; tests or fixtures cover malformed PDF parsing; strict path unchanged for well-formed PDFs.

title: pdffun: serialize sampled and calculator functions
description: Implement PDF serialization for FunctionType 0 and 4 in pdffun.pdfobject_of_function, including stream data and required dictionary entries.
acceptance_criteria: Sampled and calculator functions produce stream objects with correct dictionary entries and data; tests cover round-trip parse/eval.

title: pdfspace: implement write_colourspace
description: Write full colourspace serialization for CalGray/CalRGB/Lab/ICCBased/Indexed/Pattern/Separation/DeviceN with helper encoding for tables and ICC streams.
acceptance_criteria: write_colourspace covers all ColourSpace variants; tests verify round-trip for CalGray, Indexed, ICCBased.

title: pdfannot: support border dash arrays
description: Allow non-empty /Border dash arrays when serializing annotations.
acceptance_criteria: Annotations with dasharray serialize to /Border with dash array entries; add test.

title: pdfcodec: support PNG/TIFF predictors for encoding
description: Implement encode_predictor for TIFF2 and PNG predictors (None/Sub/Up/Average/Paeth/Optimum) and wire process_prediction to accept these Predictor variants.
acceptance_criteria: Encoding supports Predictor::TIFF2 and PNG predictors; tests cover round-trip decode for each predictor.

title: Phase 6: Images + extras
description: Implement pdfimage, pdfjpeg, pdfannot, pdfmarks, pdfocg, pdfmerge, pdfst.
close_reason: Phase 6 packages implemented (pdfmerge + prior pdfannot/pdfocg/pdfst; remaining already present)

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Implemented pdfmerge package (merge logic, renumbering, bookmarks, name tree handling). Phase 6 packages now complete alongside pdfannot/pdfocg/pdfst work. Commit: 9aa9737.

title: Phase 7: Crypto
description: Implement pdfcryptprimitives + pdfcrypt (pure SHA2/AES/Rijndael ports).

title: Fix pdf_to_file close abort
description: Investigate pdftest run exiting with code 255 (abort on File::close); adjust pdfwrite file close to run under async runtime.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Switched pdftest to async file I/O (open/read_exactly/write_file) and removed use of pdf_of_file/pdf_to_file so it no longer relies on @async.run_async_main; pdftest now runs successfully on camlpdf/logo.pdf.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Switched cmd/pdftest to async main with async fs read/write and in-memory pdf_to_output path; no @async.run_async_main used in new path. moon run cmd/pdftest works on camlpdf/logo.pdf.

title: pdfmarks: fix bookmark string mangling
description: Investigate and fix regression where bookmark strings are mangled when reading/writing bookmarks. Align with camlpdf behavior in pdfmarks.ml. Add regression test.

title: Parity audit vs camlpdf
description: Compare camlpdf module list to mbtpdf packages, note any missing or partial features; open follow-up BD tasks for gaps.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Checked camlpdf module list (pdf*.ml) vs mbtpdf packages: all core modules have MoonBit packages. Only camlpdf data-generation modules (pdfafmdata.source/pdfglyphlist.source) and C stubs/compressor are not mirrored; data appears pre-generated in pdfafmdata/pdfglyphlist and pure flate lives in pdfflate. No missing packages found at module level; deeper per-API parity would be a separate task if desired.

title: pdf: skip renumbering objects without indirect refs
description: Match camlpdf optimization: before renumbering an object, check whether it contains any indirect refs that actually change. Avoid renumbering when unnecessary for speed. Source: camlpdf Changes.txt 2.9.

title: Remove run_async_main and isolate async IO
description: Remove @async.run_async_main usage by making IO wrappers async, buffering channel output, and updating commands/tests. Isolate IO-heavy paths into async functions where needed.

comments.author: Hongbo Zhang
comments.text: Removed all @async.run_async_main; moved file/channel IO to async wrappers (pdfio input_of_file/channel, pdfread/pdfwrite file/channel APIs), added buffered Output.flush for channel writes, and updated command mains/tests to async with defer file.close(). Added async codec helpers for imagemagick CCITTG4 and JBIG2 decoding (decode_pdfstream_async*), and sync decode path now reports JBIG2 requires async variant.
